title: Maximising value for pupils
body: "Information about the Maximising value for pupils programme, which tackles systemic barriers and supports schools and trusts to allocate resource effectively across 4 pillars:   commercial assets workforce developing capability, including digital and commercial   It explains current initiatives, future plans and practical tools to help schools and trusts secure better deals, optimise budgets and reinvest savings to improve education for all children.  "

taxons.title: Local authority schools financial reporting and assurance
